name: DTimestamp Overlay
description: Shows live date, time and timezone overlay on every page for screenshot timestamping.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'none'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self'; connect-src 'none'; font-src 'none'; media-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'
